channel.title: GitHub Astro Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Astro in GitHub

item.title: onwidget/astrowind
item.description: ⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro 4.0 and Tailwind CSS. Astro starter theme.

item.title: saicaca/fuwari
item.description: A static blog template built with Astro.

item.title: manuelernestog/astrofy
item.description: Astrofy is a free and open-source template for your Personal Portfolio Website built with Astro and TailwindCSS. Create in minutes a website with Blog, CV, Project Section, Store and RSS Feed.

item.title: midudev/minimalist-portfolio-json
item.description: A minimalist portafolio configurable via one JSON

item.title: surjithctly/astroship
item.description: Astroship is a starter template for startups, marketing websites, landing pages & blog. Built with Astro & TailwindCSS

item.title: midudev/la-velada-web-oficial
item.description: Web oficial de La Velada IV de Ibai Llanos

item.title: jonasmerlin/astro-seo
item.description: Makes it easy to add information that is relevant for SEO to your Astro app.

item.title: satnaing/astro-paper
item.description: A minimal, accessible and SEO-friendly Astro blog theme

item.title: nas5w/interview-guide
item.description: An opinionated, actionable guide for software engineering interviews.

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: midudev/porfolio.dev
item.description: Ejemplo de porfolio para programadores y desarrolladores

item.title: otoyo/astro-notion-blog
item.description: 🚀 Begin building your very own Notion Blog with Astro.

item.title: ColorlibHQ/AdminLTE
item.description: AdminLTE - Free admin dashboard template based on Bootstrap 5

item.title: nf-core/website
item.description: Code and files for the main nf-core website.
